Name: Spectra Luxury Gluedown Vinyl Flooring Biscotti Oak Plank
Description: Spectra Luxury Gluedown Vinyl Flooring Biscotti Oak Plank brings a fresh, light oak aesthetic into your space, perfect for brightening both modern and traditional interiors. Its soft, natural tones and realistic wood-effect detailing create an airy feel, while the generous 1320mm board length and wide 196mm planks help rooms feel more open and balanced. Crafted in a plank design with subtle bevelled edges, this flooring features an Embossed in Register (EIR) surface that follows the printed grain pattern for an authentic, textured finish. Built to perform, the 2.5mm thickness combined with a strong 0.55mm wear layer provides dependable protection against daily wear in busy households and commercial settings. The gluedown installation method ensures a firm, stable fit and a clean, streamlined appearance once professionally laid. Fully waterproof, it is well suited to moisture-prone spaces including kitchens, bathrooms and utility rooms, as well as living rooms, bedrooms, hallways, dining rooms and conservatories. Compatible with both electric and water underfloor heating systems, this durable LVT offers comfort as well as practicality. Supplied with a 25-year domestic warranty and a 10-year commercial warranty, Biscotti Oak Plank is a reliable and stylish flooring solution built for long-term performance.

Name: Mapei Keraquick Easy Rapid-Set Flexible Wall & Floor Tile Adhesive 20kg
Description: Rapid setting, high performance, S1 flexible cementitious adhesive for the installation of ceramic, porcelain, and stone tiles and mosaics to floors. Keraquick Easy S1 is a Cementitious (C), Improved (2), Fast Setting (F), Deformable (S1) tile adhesive classified as C2F S1 . Suitable for interior and exterior use, it can be used for fixing ceramic tiles, porcelain tiles, moisture-stable natural stone tiles, and mosaics. It is compatible with a wide range of substrates, including cement-based screeds, suitably prepared calcium sulphate-based screeds, concrete, plywood overlaid floors, existing unglazed ceramic floor tiles, and tile backer boards.

Name: Mapei Ultracare Kerapoxy Residue Cleaner Spray 750ml
Description: Mapei UltraCare Kerapoxy Cleaner (750ml) is a ready-to-use spray designed to remove epoxy grout residues and keep tiled surfaces clean and streak-free. Ideal for everyday maintenance, it offers a quick and effective solution for both residential and commercial spaces. This 750ml spray is suitable for use on glass, mirrors, ceramic tiles, and mosaic surfaces, making it especially useful in kitchens and bathrooms. It dries quickly without leaving streaks, helping to maintain a fresh, polished finish. Formulated specifically to break down and lift epoxy grout residues, it’s the perfect choice for post-installation cleanup or regular care in areas finished with epoxy-based grouts. It’s safe for use on most non-absorbent surfaces and helps extend the life and appearance of tiled areas.

Name: Mapei Ultraplan Renovation Screed 3240 - Self-Levelling Compound 25kg
Description: Fibre reinforced self levelling compound – 3 to 40 mm in a single application. Ultraplan Renovation Screed 3240 is a fibre reinforced self levelling compound, designed for use in the refurbishment of existing floors in both commercial and domestic applications. It can be hand or pump applied. Used for interior levelling, smoothing and infilling differences in thickness from 3 to 40 mm on new or existing concrete, screeds, stone, terrazzo and ceramic tiles, old and new timber floors, floor boards, chipboard panels, and plywood. Name: Home Choice Engineered European Nature Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Chestnut Brushed Matt Lacquered
Description: Home Choice Engineered European Nature Oak Flooring 14mm X 180mm Chestnut Brushed Matt Lacquered is a perfect example of a classically beautiful wood floor. Vacuuming and occasional damp mopping are all that's required to keep it looking fabulous.

Name: Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Banana Song Lacquered
Description: The soft tones of oak and delicate grain markings make this Barlinek flooring a winner for a variety of styles and interiors. As a rustic grade you get what the name suggests the most natural characteristics of real oak hardwood including knots of varying sizes, sapwood, mineral streaks and natural colour variation. The floor is 180mm wide, has a total thickness of 14mm and comes in standard extra-long lengths of 2200mm, also each planks consistent proportions and 4 sided bevel achieve a uniform look that works across a broad range of spaces. The lacquered finish offers excellent protection and provides a low maintenance and easy to care flooring. Featuring a fast and easy 5Gc click together joint for DIY installation, this engineered floor gives great stability and makes it suitable for use with underfloor heating and so is perfect for those looking to make the most of their space. With a 25-year warranty, you can be confident of great performance. This floor is suitable in all bedrooms, conservatories, dining rooms, hallways, kitchens, living rooms and utility rooms

Name: Bostik Wood H180 Classic-P Hybrid Wood Adhesive 14KG
Description: Bostik Hybrid Wood Adhesive 14KG is a high performance, permanently elastic, single component hybrid adhesive for surface bonding most types of wood. Maintaining this floor is just as much of a breeze as all this durability should promise - just vacuum regularly and damp mop from time to time to keep it shining on.

Name: Bostik Hytec E570 Once Coat Two-Part Epoxy Surface Damp Proof Membrane 10KG
Description: Bostik Two Part Solvent Free Epoxy Membrane 10KG is a two part, solvent-free, epoxy surface damp proof membrane (DPM). Containing the exact quantities of resin and hardener ready for mixing together, Bostik Two Part Solvent Free Epoxy Membrane 10KG is designed to suppress residual construction moisture in cementitious subfloors, which enables floor coverings to be installed earlier in building projects. On a smooth, power floated concrete base, a single coat application can provide protection up to a maximum hygrometer reading of 97% relative humidity (RH). Bostik Two Part Solvent Free Epoxy Membrane 10KG has also been developed to work with calcium sulphate screeds (up to 87% RH), and can in some circumstances be used with under floor heating systems. As it's solvent-free, Bostik Two Part Solvent Free Epoxy Membrane 10KG is suitable for use in all project work including hospitals, schools, retail outlets and commercial projects.

Name: Audacity Summer Oak Plank Luxury Rigid Core Click Vinyl Flooring

Name: Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Matt Lacquered
Description: With warm biscuit tones and eye-catching grain markings, Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Matt Lacquered will bring a relaxed, traditional look to both period and modern interiors. Name: Woca Care and Protect Kit Oil - Natural
Description: All you need in one box to clean and protect your natural and dark coloured oiled floors. Also included, the WOCA Master Cleaner, quick and easy to use, this soap effectively removes dirt and grime, as well as strengthening the surface so it's more resistant to any spillages. With a striking milky latte tone and a soft, subdued grain, this contemporary-style floor is made from finest European oak in an elegant select grade, and features occasional small knots and limited marks and streaks for a clean, modern look. A great fit for any size of room, the 725mm long micro-bevelled planks have been gently brushed to enhance their texture and finished with a low-sheen matt UV lacquer that offers excellent durability and resistance to stains and marks. This sturdy engineered wood floor boasts a 2.5mm real oak top and a three-layer construction for great stability. Both stunning and easy to care for, it requires only vacuuming and occasional light mopping to look its best.

Name: Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Brown Sugar Lacquered
Description: A truly stunning statement floor, Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 180mm Brown Sugar Lacquered is packed with vintage charm and character. Quality European oak in a rustic grade - characterised by richly detailed grain markings, multiple knots and natural colour variation - and a warm shade of mid brown makes for a floor that feels instantly comfortable and welcomingly familiar. Sanded smooth and protected with high quality UV lacquer, it will stand up to wear and tear beautifully and requires only vacuuming and occasional damp mopping to look its best, making it a great choice for family living. The wide, classic-length planks (180mm x 1100mm) are ideal for creating a feeling of space in small and medium length rooms, while fine bevel edges define each individual plank and further enhance the vintage look. Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 180mm Brown Sugar Lacquered features a three-layer construction for strength and stability, a 2.5mm real wood wear layer and a click-together joint that makes DIY installation fast and easy.

Name: QuickTherm Vapour 10m2 Underlay
Description: Featuring a unique perforated design and ultra-low tog value, our Quick Therm Vapour Underlay is perfect for use with underfloor heating systems. With a separate vapour barrier to stop moisture rising from the subfloor, this underlay will help keep your room damp-free. Suitable for use with all solid wood, engineered wood, and laminate floors, a 19db acoustic rating will ensure that every step is softer. 100% recyclable, this underlay is quick and easy to install.

Name: Series Woods 7mm Acoustic Laminate Warm Gold Oak Built-in Underlay
Description: If you’re after a low-maintenance floor with the traditional look of real wood and a homely, welcoming vibe, Series Woods 7mm Acoustic Laminate Warm Gold Oak is a great choice. In a versatile natural oak tone that will beautifully complement a wide range of colour schemes, this floor has a textured surface that replicates the feel of genuine oak and comes with all the practical benefits of a quality laminate. The planks come in a versatile size (197mm x 1220mm) ideally suited to creating a classic look in small and medium length rooms, where they will add a feeling of spaciousness. Featuring a DIY friendly click system on a 7mm thick board with a 2mm integrated underlay, makes fitting this floor even easier. Effectively soundproofing your home has just become easier, this floor features an integrated underlay with a 21dB rating reducing noise, ideal for busy homes. Series Woods 7mm Acoustic Laminate Warm Gold Oak has an AC3 Domestic rating making it suitable for hallways, kitchens, bedrooms, dining rooms, living rooms, conservatories, and utility rooms, and only requires regular vacuuming and occasional damp mopping to stay looking its best.

Name: Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Marsala Brushed Matt Lacquered
Description: If you're after a wow-factor floor to enhance a vintage scheme, Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 180mm Marsala Brushed Matt Lacquered deserves a closer look. With deep golden brown tones that will warm up any space, this fabulous floor showcases rustic oak in all its glory, with a rich swirling grain alive with multiple knots and tonal markings. It comes in wide, classic-length boards (180mm x 1100mm) that work brilliantly in most rooms, finished with bevelled edges that give beautiful definition to each plank. Brushed and textured to touch and treated with UV matt lacquer for a natural finish that offers protection against stains and marks, this floor is a family friendly choice, its 2.5mm hardwood wear layer and engineered three-layer construction giving it an enhanced lifespan and great stability. This floor features a 5GC click-together joint system that allows fast and easy DIY installation on top of underlay, with no gluing or nailing required.

Name: Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 14mm x 130mm Brushed & Oiled
Description: With its delicate grain markings and gorgeous honey tones, Home Choice Engineered European Rustic Oak Flooring 130mm Brushed & Oiled delivers perfect laid-back, traditional style and will add a homely touch to any room. Made using quality European oak in a rustic grade that celebrates its natural characteristics, this striking floor features visible knots, sapwood, mineral streaks and plenty of colour variation for maximum visual interest and a “lived in” feel. Each board has been brushed for a textured finish that brings out the beauty of the grain and treated with a natural oil that will wear beautifully over time, giving the wood even more character and depth. Maintenance is easy: simply vacuum regularly and clean occasionally with a damp mop to keep your floor looking its best. The mid-width, classic-lengths planks come in a standard size (130mm x 1100mm) for a uniform look that works brilliantly in small and medium sized rooms, where they help create a feeling of spaciousness. This three-layer engineered floor offers great stability and a 2.5mm wear layer for long-lasting good looks, as well as a 5G click-together system with joints on all four sides of each plank for faster and easier DIY installation.
